recap:
- Document processing is crucial for creating a high-quality knowledge base for retrieval agents, especially when documents are the main knowledge source.
- Real-world documents often have complex structures, including images, multi-column layouts, tables, and various hierarchical elements that complicate parsing.
- The `ai_parse_document` function in Databricks aids in robust parsing of PDFs and images, extracting structured content and layout information.
- Challenges in document parsing include preserving hierarchical information, maintaining reading order in multi-column formats, and ensuring contextual integrity of images and text.
- Large Language Models (LLMs) and Optical Character Recognition (OCR) models are modern solutions that can interpret document layouts and extract information effectively.
- OCR models identify text within images, while multimodal LLMs can understand the spatial arrangement of elements in a document.
